title: rosa coriifolia subsp. cinerea
intro: Rosa coriifolia subsp. cinerea, also known as the grey-leafed rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa coriifolia plant, a type of wild rose native to Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa coriifolia subsp. cinerea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
